title: hyoscyamus × gyorffyi
intro: Hyoscyamus × gyorffyi, also known as Györfy's henbane, is a hybrid plant derived from the genus Hyoscyamus, a group of flowering plants in the nightshade family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anticholinergic and sedative effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus × gyorffyi include its ability to reduce anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential use as a muscle relaxant and pain reliever. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and seeds, which are often used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
